content: cfe_internal/update/  Table of contents This directory contains internal management polcies related to the default update policy like ensuring inputs is a copy of masterfiles from your policy server and ensuring the CFEngine components are running. Some policies contained in this directory are only aplicable to CFEngine Enterprise and others are used in both Community and Enterprise editions.
